response.justification: Strong hands-on senior/staff engineer with ~15+ years of broad full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure experience, but the profile does not match a Director-level IC Principal Engineer in AI strategy. AI exposure is recent and limited to agent tooling/MCP work since April 2025, with no recognized AI products, platforms, publications, or thought leadership. Cloud depth is modest (AWS CDK, Kubernetes for a personal project), there is no Master's/PhD in an AI field, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product direction at scale.
strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder of GISCollective open-source platform; community talks and workshops show teaching/influence
Recent exposure to agentic workflows, MCP code generators, and AI-agent infrastructure
concerns: No Director-level IC scope or recognized AI expertise; AI work is <1 year and tooling-focused
No demonstrated AI products/platforms, research output, or advanced AI-related degree
Limited evidence of cloud-strategy advisory, large-org influence, or customer-facing technical leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / built AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
